suite: EPIC 2E-J — Step 7B-B-F1-R / F1-R2: static decision self-test (no Chromium, no network, no DOM)

Case A: all PASS => exit code is success (0)
Case B: one FAIL => decision is FAIL
Case B: one FAIL => exit code is non-zero
Case C: unexpected NOT_TESTED (Contrast) => decision is FAIL
Case C: unexpected NOT_TESTED (Contrast) => exit code is non-zero

Case D: unexpected NOT_TESTED (Clear Session) => exit code is non-zero

Case E: only Physical touch hardware NOT_TESTED => exit code is success (0)
Case F: Physical touch hardware + one FAIL => decision is FAIL
Case F: Physical touch hardware + one FAIL => exit code is non-zero
Case G: empty results Array => decision is FAIL
Case G: empty results Array => exit code is non-zero

Case H: null results => exit code is non-zero
Case I: undefined results => decision is FAIL
Case I: undefined results => exit code is non-zero
Case J: malformed result status ("UNKNOWN") => decision is FAIL
Case J: malformed result status ("UNKNOWN") => exit code is non-zero
Case K: missing result field => decision is FAIL
Case K: missing result field => exit code is non-zero
Case L: missing test field => decision is FAIL
Case L: missing test field => exit code is non-zero

Case M: blank test field => exit code is non-zero

Case N: null row => exit code is non-zero
Case O: malformed permittedNotTested does not throw

Case O: malformed permittedNotTested => exit code is non-zero
Regression: all PASS still => PASS after FIX 1/2 hardening
Regression: only Physical touch hardware NOT_TESTED still => CONDITIONAL_PASS after FIX 1/2 hardening
isAllowedExternalFontUrl allows only fonts.googleapis.com/fonts.gstatic.com (lookalikes rejected)

Case Q: JavaScript scheme URL ("javascript://fonts.googleapis.com/x") => rejected

browserSuiteExecution.reason: This static self-test never executes, simulates, or fabricates the real Chromium browser suite regardless of whether a Browser binary is currently available — Browser availability is reported honestly here for diagnostic purposes only. The FIX 1/2/3 changes to qa/epic-2e-j-phase-c-step7b-b-test.mjs (fail-closed decision wiring, console/resource listeners, required result rows) were NOT executed by THIS static suite.
